title: ''
labels: good first issue, help wanted

---

**Task from CONTRIBUTING.md (or similar high-signal small win):**

- [ ] Link to the specific item in CONTRIBUTING.md (e.g. "Expand failure taxonomy..." or "Implement browser-qa/server.py")

**Description of what you plan to do (keep it small and focused):**

**Files you expect to touch:**

**How you will verify (tests, `python scripts/validate-skills.py`, manual run of demo, etc.):**

**Anything you need clarified before starting?**

---

Remember:
- Follow AGENTS.md (Plan Mode for anything non-trivial, small diffs, verification first).
- All original creative work is attributed to Cobus Greyling; contributions are credited in commits/CHANGELOG.
- Run the validation + installer dry-run before opening the PR.
- PR description should reference the skill/pattern used (e.g. "Used subagent-arena to explore two approaches...").

Thanks for helping improve the arsenal!
